text.title: Agent Replay Harness Cookbook Examples
text.summary: One full worked example: applying the cookbook to a Claude Agent SDK research agent that occasionally returns truncated results.

example.title: Captured trace
example.note: Event 3 is the truncation — the bug we want to reproduce.

example.title: Wired LLM stub
example.note: The stub raises on prompt drift instead of fabricating a completion.

example.title: Pytest replay assertion
example.code: def test_replay_reproduces_truncation(): harness = load_manifest("harness-manifest.json") result = harness.run() assert result.events[3]["completion"] == "<TRUNCATED>" # Bug is now reproducible; next we fix and re-run.
example.note: Once this test passes, fixes can be validated by inverting the assertion.
